title: Insert Image
imageSource: Image source — upload a file or embed from URL
altTextPlaceholder: Enter a description of the image content
imageRequired: Please upload an image or embed an image URL
modalDescription: Upload an image or embed from a URL. Add alt text, caption, and an optional link.
dropHint: Drag and drop an image here
dropMeta: Max size: 10MB  Recommended: 1200 x 800 px  Formats: jpg/jpeg, png
embedHint: No file size limit. Recommended for large images.
embedUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)
displayPlaceholder: Enter a caption to display below the image
targetUrlPlaceholder: Enter the URL to open when clicking the image
targetUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)
